Chat Edit: '🔥 NOW: TASK 2 - BotBuilder GUI (11 HOURS)
You're now 85.7% complete (12/14 tasks). Two tasks remaining, both can run in parallel.

Which would you prefer?

Option A: Start Task 2 (BotBuilder) now

Requires: Visual Studio + C# + WPF
Time: 11 hours across Configuration → Advanced → Build → Preview tabs
Impact: Gives you the GUI interface for the entire toolkit
Option B: Start Task 3 (Beast Swarm) now

Requires: Python 3.8+ environment
Time: 24 hours across 6 optimization phases
Impact: Productionizes the swarm system
Option C: Start BOTH in parallel (recommended for solo - stack them)

Run VS in one terminal, Python in another
Maximize parallel execution across your solo dev
Which one? Let me know and I'll give you the exact code + checklist to roll with.

Whatever you select im selecting the opposite of'
